   373вЖТ                let el = card;
   374вЖТ                while (el) {

   380вЖТ                    }
   381вЖТ                    el = el.parentElement;
   382вЖТ                }
   383вЖТ                // Also check descendants for the contactcard pattern

   400вЖТ                    let hash = 0;
   401вЖТ                    for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
   402вЖТ                        const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
   403вЖТ                        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
   404вЖТ                        hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
   405вЖТ                    }
   406вЖТ                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
   407вЖТ                }
   408вЖТ
   409вЖТ                // Skip duplicates based on the computed ID
   410вЖТ                if (seenNames.has(maimaiId)) continue;
   411вЖТ                seenNames.add(maimaiId);
   412вЖТ
   413вЖТ                // Build profile URL from user ID when available

   418вЖТ
   419вЖТ                // Fallback: extract profile URL from <a> tags inside the card
   420вЖТ                if (!profileUrl) {

   422вЖТ

   429вЖТ                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;

   432вЖТ                        }
   433вЖТ                        ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
   434вЖТ                    }
   435вЖТ
   436вЖТ                    // Second: search all <a> descendants inside the card
   437вЖТ                    if (!profileUrl) {
   438вЖТ                        const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   439вЖТ                        for (const link of links) {
   440вЖТ                            const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
   441вЖТ                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {

   445вЖТ                            if (!fallbackUrl && href && !href.startsWith('javascript:') && (href.startsWith('/') || href.includes('maimai.cn'))) {
   446вЖТ                                fallbackUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   447вЖТ                            }

   449вЖТ                    }
   450вЖТ                    if (!profileUrl && fallbackUrl) {

   453вЖТ                }
   454вЖТ
   455вЖТ                // Extract location: look for remaining short text parts after name/company/title
   456вЖТ                // Common patterns: city names like "еМЧдЇђ", "дЄКжµЈ", "жЈ±еЬ≥" etc.
   457вЖТ                let location = '';
   458вЖТ                const locationPatterns = /^(еМЧдЇђ|дЄКжµЈ|еєњеЈЮ|жЈ±еЬ≥|жЭ≠еЈЮ|жИРйГљ|еНЧдЇђ|ж≠¶ж±Й|и•њеЃЙ|иЛПеЈЮ|йХњж≤Щ|е§©жі•|йЗНеЇЖ|йГСеЈЮ|дЄЬиОЮ|йЭТе≤Ы|е§ІињЮ|еЃБж≥Ґ|еО¶йЧ®|еРИиВ•|дљЫе±±|з¶ПеЈЮ|жШЖжШО|жµОеНЧ|зП†жµЈ|жЧ†йФ°|еЄЄеЈЮ|жµЈе§Ц|ињЬз®Л|й¶ЩжЄѓ|еП∞еМЧ|жЦ∞еК†еЭ°|зЊОеЫљ|жЧ•жЬђ|йЯ©еЫљ|иЛ±еЫљ|еЕ®еЫљ|еЕґдїЦ)/;
   459вЖТ                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {

   461вЖТ                    if (part === name || part === company || part === title || part === industry) continue;
   462вЖТ                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   463вЖТ                    if (locationPatterns.test(part) && part.length <= 10) {

   468вЖТ
   469вЖТ                candidates.push({

   475вЖТ                    location: location,

   477вЖТ            }

   480вЖТ        }''')
   481вЖТ
   482вЖТ        logger.info(f"JavaScript extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")

   494вЖТ
   495вЖТ        # For candidates missing profile_url, try extracting from contactcard DOM

   499вЖТ            for c in missing_url:

   502вЖТ                    if profile_url:

   504вЖТ                except Exception as e:

   506вЖТ
   507вЖТ        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   508вЖТ        profile_links = []
   509вЖТ        if not candidates:

   511вЖТ
   512вЖТ        if profile_links and not candidates:

   514вЖТ
   515вЖТ            seen_ids = set()
   516вЖТ            for link in profile_links:
   517вЖТ                try:
   518вЖТ                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   519вЖТ                    if not href:
   520вЖТ                        continue
   521вЖТ
   522вЖТ                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   523вЖТ                    maimai_id = None
   524вЖТ                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   525вЖТ                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   526вЖТ                    elif '/u/' in href:

   528вЖТ
   529вЖТ                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   530вЖТ                        continue
   531вЖТ                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   532вЖТ
   533вЖТ                    # Get name from link text
   534вЖТ                    name = await link.inner_text()
   535вЖТ                    name = name.strip()
   536вЖТ                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)

   538вЖТ
   539вЖТ                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   540вЖТ                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   541вЖТ

   579вЖТ        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection

   594вЖТ                        name = await link.inner_text()
   595вЖТ
   596вЖТ                        maimai_id = None
   597вЖТ                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:

   613вЖТ        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles

   615вЖТ        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]

   628вЖТdef _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   629вЖТ    """
   630вЖТ    Save or update candidates in database.
   631вЖТ
   632вЖТ    Args:
   633вЖТ        db_manager: Database manager instance
   634вЖТ        candidates: List of candidates to save
   635вЖТ        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   636вЖТ    """
   637вЖТ    try:
   638вЖТ        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   639вЖТ            for c in candidates:
   640вЖТ                # Check if candidate exists by maimai_id
   641вЖТ                existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=c.maimai_id).first()
   642вЖТ
   643вЖТ                # Also check by name+company to avoid creating duplicates with different generated IDs
   644вЖТ                if not existing:
   645вЖТ                    existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(
   646вЖТ                        name=c.name, company=c.company
   647вЖТ                    ).first()
   648вЖТ
   649вЖТ                if existing:
   650вЖТ                    # Update existing
   651вЖТ                    existing.name = c.name
   652вЖТ                    existing.title = c.title
   653вЖТ                    existing.company = c.company
   654вЖТ                    existing.location = c.location
   655вЖТ                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   656вЖТ                else:
   657вЖТ                    # Create new
   658вЖТ                    candidate = Candidate(
   659вЖТ                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   660вЖТ                        name=c.name,
   661вЖТ                        title=c.title,
   662вЖТ                        company=c.company,
   663вЖТ                        location=c.location,
   664вЖТ                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   665вЖТ                        source_search=source_search
   666вЖТ                    )
   667вЖТ                    session.add(candidate)
   668вЖТ
   669вЖТ            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   670вЖТ
   671вЖТ    except Exception as e:

   700вЖТasync def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   701вЖТ    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   702вЖТ
   703вЖТ    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   704вЖТ    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   705вЖТ    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   706вЖТ
   707вЖТ    Args:
   708вЖТ        page: Playwright page on the search results
   709вЖТ        name: Candidate name to match
   710вЖТ        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   711вЖТ
   712вЖТ    Returns:
   713вЖТ        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   714вЖТ    """
   715вЖТ    try:
   716вЖТ        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   717вЖТ            const { name, company } = args;
   718вЖТ            // Find all contactcard elements
   719вЖТ            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   720вЖТ            for (const el of ccElements) {
   721вЖТ                const text = el.textContent || '';
   722вЖТ                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   723вЖТ                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   724вЖТ                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   725вЖТ                if (match) return match[1];
   726вЖТ            }
   727вЖТ            return null;
   728вЖТ        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   729вЖТ
   730вЖТ        if user_id:
   731вЖТ            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   732вЖТ            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   733вЖТ            return profile_url
   734вЖТ
   735вЖТ        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   736вЖТ        return None
   737вЖТ
   738вЖТ    except Exception as e:
   739вЖТ        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   740вЖТ        return None
   741вЖТ
   742вЖТ
   743вЖТ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   744вЖТ# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   745вЖТ# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   746вЖТ
   747вЖТMAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   748вЖТENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   749вЖТ
   750вЖТ
   751вЖТasync def search_candidates_enterprise(
   752вЖТ    keywords: str,
   753вЖТ    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   754вЖТ    pages: int = 1,
   755вЖТ    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   756вЖТ    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   757вЖТ) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   758вЖТ    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   759вЖТ
   760вЖТ    Flow:
   761вЖТ    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "жЛЫиБШ" tab (opens new tab)
   762вЖТ    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   763вЖТ    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   764вЖТ    4. Optionally add company filter
   765вЖТ    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   766вЖТ    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   767вЖТ    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   768вЖТ
   769вЖТ    Args:
   770вЖТ        keywords: Search keywords
   771вЖТ        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   772вЖТ        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   773вЖТ        browser: Browser manager instance
   774вЖТ        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   775вЖТ
   776вЖТ    Returns:
   777вЖТ        List of CandidateBasic objects
   778вЖТ    """
   779вЖТ    validate_keywords(keywords)
   780вЖТ
   781вЖТ    if browser is None:
   782вЖТ        browser = get_browser_manager()
   783вЖТ
   784вЖТ    config = get_config()
   785вЖТ    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   786вЖТ    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   787вЖТ
   788вЖТ    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   789вЖТ
   790вЖТ    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   791вЖТ    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   792вЖТ
   793вЖТ    with Progress(
   794вЖТ        SpinnerColumn(),
   795вЖТ        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   796вЖТ        console=console,
   797вЖТ    ) as progress:
   798вЖТ        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   799вЖТ
   800вЖТ        try:
   801вЖТ            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   802вЖТ
   803вЖТ            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   804вЖТ            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   805вЖТ            page = browser.page
   806вЖТ
   807вЖТ            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click жЛЫиБШ tab
   808вЖТ            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   809вЖТ            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   810вЖТ
   811вЖТ            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   812вЖТ            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   813вЖТ            if not recruitment_tab:
   814вЖТ                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   815вЖТ
   816вЖТ            # Click opens a new tab вАФ use BrowserManager API
   817вЖТ            await recruitment_tab.click()
   818вЖТ            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   819вЖТ            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   820вЖТ
   821вЖТ            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   822вЖТ
   823вЖТ            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   824вЖТ            try:
   825вЖТ                await page.wait_for_url(
   826вЖТ                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   827вЖТ                    timeout=15000,
